indications.text:
Nimotop® (nimodipine) is indicated for the improvement of neurological outcome by reducing the
incidence and severity of ischemic deficits in patients with subarachnoid hemorrhage from ruptured
intracranial berry aneurysms regardless of their post-ictus neurological condition (i.e., Hunt and Hess
